description:
Determine the physical state (Solid, Liquid, or Gas) of Benzene, Ethyl Chloride, Phenol, and Naphthalene at -10°C (14°F) and 45°C (113°F) using physical properties from CAMEO Chemicals. Create a report at ~/Documents/phase_state_report.txt including the Melting Point (MP), Boiling Point (BP), and predicted physical state for each chemical.

The report must use the following format:

PHASE STATE ANALYSIS REPORT
===========================
Chemical: Benzene
  Melting Point: [Value] C
  Boiling Point: [Value] C
  State at -10C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]
  State at 45C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]

Chemical: Ethyl Chloride
  Melting Point: [Value] C
  Boiling Point: [Value] C
  State at -10C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]
  State at 45C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]

Chemical: Phenol
  Melting Point: [Value] C
  Boiling Point: [Value] C
  State at -10C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]
  State at 45C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]

Chemical: Naphthalene
  Melting Point: [Value] C
  Boiling Point: [Value] C
  State at -10C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]
  State at 45C: [Solid/Liquid/Gas]
